name: left_ruby_pair

meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.14 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-07-01] The left-side-ruby span pair: ［＃左にルビ付き］ opens and ［＃左に「Y」のルビ付き終わり］ closes a run carrying a left-side ruby whose reading Y is named on the closer. Both are raw-preserving Direct directives (editorial kinds ruby-pair-open / ruby-pair-close), not coupled at the tree level (like the inline warichu pair). §8 renders a compact marker on each — 左ルビ on the opener and 左ルビ「Y」 on the closer; Y is a gloss (not surrounding text), so it does not double-render. Serialize re-emits both raw brackets byte-exact, preserving Y verbatim. Offsets from the §4 byte model (each fullwidth char = 3 bytes); cross-checked against the reference processor.

source: 親［＃左にルビ付き］子［＃左に「よみ」のルビ付き終わり］

expected.html: 親左ルビ子左ルビ「よみ」
expected.serialize: 親［＃左にルビ付き］子［＃左に「よみ」のルビ付き終わり］
